overview.description: Papikonda National Park is a national park in India, located near Rajamahendravaram in the Papi Hills of the Polavaram and Eluru districts of Andhra Pradesh, and covering an area of 1,012.86 km2 (391.07 mi2). It is an Important Bird and Biodiversity Area and home to some endangered species of flora and fauna. No part of Papikonda remains outside East and West Godavari districts after 2014 and the construction of Polavaram Dam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Papikonda National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Papikonda National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Papikonda National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajahmundry Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (141 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Papikonda National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Papikonda National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Papikonda National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Papikonda National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
